ja: あのガキを殺してやる！
vi: Tao se giet thang nho do!

en: Marv! Harry? Where the hell did you take your shoes off?
ja: どこで靴を脱いだんだ？
vi: May cat giay o dau vay?

en: Why the hell are you dressed like a chicken? I'm up here, you morons!
ja: なんで鶏みたいな格好してるんだ？
vi: Sao may an mac nhu con ga vay?

en: You guys give up, or you're thirsty for more?
ja: お前ら降参か、それともまだやるか？
zhTW: 你們放棄了，還是還想繼續？
vi: Chung may dau hang hay con muon tiep?
